task.zh: 蝴蝶只有一边翅膀！在镜子的另一边画出对称的翅膀吧！
task.en: The butterfly only has one wing! Draw the matching wing on the other side of the mirror!

hints.zh: 看看左边的形状，右边要画出一模一样的
hints.en: Look at the shape on the left — draw the same thing on the right

hints.zh: 虚线就是镜子，两边要对称哦
hints.en: The dashed line is the mirror — both sides should match
Draw the outline first, then add details
